overall.description: Gameplay footage from a tropical open-world game (Far Cry 6 style) showing navigation through a colorful residential courtyard with cobblestone paths, transitioning through narrow alleyways to an open coastal road with vintage 1950s-era vehicles and ocean views.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical residential courtyard with cobblestone pathways

events.description: camera passes a gardener NPC trimming grass on the left side
moving from initial narrow passage into more open courtyard area with banana trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along cobblestone paths past a gardener and through tropical residential buildings

notable_agents.action: gardener using a string trimmer to cut grass along the building wall

entered.detail: two-story residential building with red trim and metal window grilles
irregular stone paving forming the main walkway
large tropical plant with broad leaves in a central planter
residential structure with external staircase and wooden balcony

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a tropical residential area with cobblestone paths and colorful buildings. The camera walks past a gardener trimming grass and continues through a narrow courtyard with palm trees and banana plants, transitioning from a tight passage to a more open courtyard space.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard complex with dirt ground and external staircases

events.description: entering enclosed courtyard area with dirt ground surface replacing cobblestones
moving into shadowed alleyway between buildings with reduced sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages and courtyards between colorful buildings, turning corners

entered.detail: set of five concrete steps leading to a building entrance
single large tree in a circular grass bed in the courtyard center
two-story structure with weathered turquoise and orange paint
white concrete stairs leading to second floor balcony
orange wooden ladder leaning against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an enclosed courtyard complex with dirt ground, passing a central tree and navigating between colorful buildings with external staircases. The environment shifts from cobblestone to dirt as the camera explores the semi-covered alleyways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered carport passage leading to coastal road

events.description: emerging from covered carport passage to open coastal road with ocean view
red vintage convertible drives past on the coastal road

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered carport with an abandoned car and emerging onto the sunny coastal road

notable_agents.action: red vintage convertible with white roof driving along the coastal road

entered.detail: metal roof structure covering a narrow passage between buildings
derelict vintage sedan with rust and flat tires
turquoise ocean visible through the end of the passage
low concrete barrier separating the road from the ocean

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a shadowed covered carport containing an abandoned car, then emerges onto a bright coastal road. A red vintage convertible drives past as the scene opens up to reveal the ocean and a concrete seawall.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with ocean views and vintage traffic

events.description: transitioning from walking to driving along the coastal road
passing a yellow taxi and other vintage cars parked along the seawall

agents.ego_description: driving a vehicle along the scenic coastal road, navigating past other vintage cars and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red and white vintage sedan driving ahead on the road
group of people standing near the seawall looking at the ocean

entered.detail: large weathered sign with red text reading 'ZONA DE CIRCULACION CONCEPCION'
low barrier along the sidewalk edge facing the ocean
vintage yellow convertible taxi parked by the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera drives along a wide-open coastal highway with the ocean visible to the left, passing vintage 1950s-era vehicles including a red convertible and yellow taxi. Pedestrians stand near the seawall enjoying the view as the camera moves past a large billboard sign and continues along the scenic waterfront road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, colorful confines of a tropical residential courtyard out toward a wide, sun-drenched coastal highway. It begins by walking along cobblestone paths past a gardener and through narrow passages filled with palm trees and banana plants, before the terrain shifts to dirt as the camera navigates an enclosed complex of buildings with external staircases. The scene then moves through the shadows of a covered carport containing an abandoned car, emerging abruptly into bright daylight onto a coastal road as a red vintage convertible drives past. Finally, the perspective expands along a scenic waterfront highway, passing 1950s-era taxis and pedestrians by a concrete seawall with the open ocean stretching out to the left.
